description: CompositionGrey sweatshirt made of 80% cotton and 20% polyester, has a ribbed round neck, long raglan sleeves, ribbed cuffs and hem, mock pocket on the left chest with a synthetic leather piping, adidas patented 3-Stripes running from the back chest to the left sleeve, and branding in print on the right sleeveFittingComfortWash careWash below 40 degrees separatelyDo not dry cleanDo not soak, bleach or tumble dryDry in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decoartionsPerfect for your sporty fashion needs, this sweatshirt from adidas is designed to keep you warm and comfortable in the winter chill. Team it with adidas track pants or denims and sports shoes.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in sweatshirtsHeight: 6'1', Shoulders: 18.5"
